mapper.select: SELECT mt.id,mt.message_id, mt.wechat_user_id, mt.content, mt.message_reply_id,wu.nick_name FROM t_message_reply mt LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user wu ON mt.wechat_user_id = wu.id where mt.message_id=#{messageId}

SELECT t1.id, t1.message_id, t1.wechat_user_id, t1.content, t1.message_reply_id , t2.nick_name FROM t_message_reply t1 LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t2 ON t1.wechat_user_id = t2.id WHERE t1.message_id = #{messageId} AND t1.message_reply_id IS NULL ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC LIMIT 0,2
SELECT count(id) FROM t_message_reply WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND message_reply_id IS NULL

SELECT t1.id, t1.message_id, t1.wechat_user_id, t1.content, t1.message_reply_id , t1.create_time, t2.nick_name, t2.head_img FROM t_message_reply t1 LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t2 ON t1.wechat_user_id = t2.id WHERE t1.message_id = #{messageId} AND t1.message_reply_id IS NULL ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.message_id, t1.wechat_user_id, t1.content, t1.message_reply_id , t1.create_time, t2.nick_name, t2.head_img, t3.nick_name AS recommend_name FROM t_message_reply t1 LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t2 ON t1.wechat_user_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t3 ON t1.recommend_id = t3.id WHERE t1.message_id = #{messageId} AND t1.message_reply_id = #{messageReplyId} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.message_id, t1.wechat_user_id, t1.content, t1.message_reply_id , t1.create_time, t2.nick_name, t2.head_img FROM t_message_reply t1 LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t2 ON t1.wechat_user_id = t2.id WHERE t1.message_id = #{messageId} AND t1.id = #{messageReplyId} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t1.id, t1.wechat_user_id, t1.message_id, t1.message_reply_id, t1.recommend_id , t1.recommend_reply_id, t1.content,t2.`name`,t2.wechat_user_id message_wechat_user_id , t3.head_img, t3.nick_name,DATE_FORMAT(t1.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time , DATE_FORMAT(t2.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time FROM t_message_reply t1 LEFT JOIN t_message t2 ON t1.message_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN t_wechat_user t3 ON t1.wechat_user_id = t3.id WHERE (t1.recommend_id = #{wechatUserId} OR t1.wechat_user_id = #{wechatUserId} OR (t1.recommend_id IS NULL AND t2.wechat_user_id = #{wechatUserId})) ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
